name: Galaxy Network Lineup
description: The full Galaxy Network channel lineup — 29 curated channels with tiers, vibes, and styles.

channels.name: Galaxy ONE
channels.style: Curated best-of — hand-picked, every slot intentional

channels.name: Galaxy 2
channels.style: The 'always on' channel — comfortable, familiar, zero commitment

channels.name: Galaxy Premium
channels.style: AMC/FX energy — prestige-adjacent but accessible

channels.name: Galaxy Action
channels.style: Big, loud, fun. Franchise-driven. The popcorn channel.

channels.name: Galaxy Thrills
channels.style: Morning = suspense. Night = full horror. Escalates through the day.

channels.name: Galaxy Crime
channels.style: Bingeable cases and cops. Obsessive, detail-driven 'one more episode' energy.

channels.name: Galaxy Romance
channels.style: Feelings-first. Light mornings, epic love stories at prime, steamy late night.

channels.name: Galaxy Now
channels.style: Buzz and chaos. Channel surfing energy. Always something happening.

channels.name: Galaxy Comedy
channels.style: Easy laughs all day. Classic mornings, movies afternoon, stand-up headliner at prime.

channels.name: Galaxy Puerto Rico
channels.style: Island identity and community. Music-heavy. Cultural pride all day.

channels.name: Galaxy Yaideliz
channels.style: Your channel, your rules. No formula. Pure taste. Update frequently.

channels.name: Galaxy Kids
channels.style: Parent-safe 24/7. Preschool mornings, big movies at night. Nothing scary.

channels.name: Galaxy Toons
channels.style: Catch-all cartoon channel. Lighter and broader than Animated. Pure toon energy.

channels.name: Galaxy WBToons
channels.style: Full WB animation legacy. Looney Tunes mornings, Kids' WB midday, DCAU at night.

channels.name: Galaxy Animated
channels.style: Day = family-friendly animation. Night = adult animation, anime, mature storytelling.

channels.name: Galaxy Anime
channels.style: Shonen energy during the day, deeper mature titles after 10PM. Anime-only channel.

channels.name: Cartoon Network
channels.style: CN golden era — Dexter's Lab through Adventure Time.

channels.name: Boomerang
channels.style: Pure nostalgia archive. Nothing post-2000. Grandparent-safe and childhood-core.

channels.name: Disney Channel
channels.style: DCOMs prime time, sitcom afternoons, animated mornings.

channels.name: Disney XD
channels.style: Boy-skewing action and adventure. More kinetic and plot-driven than Disney Channel.

channels.name: Nickelodeon
channels.style: Nick Jr. mornings, Nicktoons midday, live-action afternoon, Avatar late night.

channels.name: Nicktoons
channels.style: Animation-only Nick. No live-action. Pure Nicktoons catalog — deep cuts and fan favorites.

channels.name: MTV
channels.style: Buzz and chaos. TRL energy. Music videos to reality TV to Jackass.

channels.name: Galaxy Premieres
channels.style: HBO flagship energy. Everything should feel like an event. Only the best.

channels.name: Galaxy Cinema
channels.style: The all-day movie channel. Wide variety, well-slotted by time of day.

channels.name: Galaxy Hits
channels.style: Movies everyone has seen and wants to see again. Pure comfort blockbusters.

channels.name: Galaxy Thriller
channels.style: Premium tension. Smarter, slower-burn than Galaxy Thrills. Films that reward attention.

channels.name: Galaxy Vault
channels.style: Heritage cinema. Pre-2000 only. Black & white welcome. Prestige and history.

channels.name: Galaxy After Dark
channels.style: Late-night freedom. The channel where anything goes. Peak hours 10PM-4AM.
